prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: HWC-BADGECASEHOLDER-ROUND Product Type: BADGE_HOLDER Brand (from catalog): ASR Federal Existing Title: ASR Federal Black Bifold Leather ID Card and Badge Holder Police Gear, Round Description: Easy to carry on the daily or take with you when you're traveling for training, the ASR Federal police badge ID holder wallet is the perfect size for carrying your minimal but most important belongings when on duty. This police badge holder features a ID slot with clear vinyl covering and recessed badge cut-out design, allowing your police badge to fit seamlessly without any extra added bulk.

The ASR Federal Genuine Leather Police ID Badge Holder is compact and low profile, specifically designed to hold a police badge without feeling the bulk of the badge itself. This ID badge holder is ideal for officers while on duty, as its minimalist design only has room to hold your badge and department issued credentials with no other personal identifying items to carry. The recessed badge compartment keeps the ID badge holder profile minimal and compact; an area for cash or cards is excluded in this design, reducing excess bulk and unneeded personal identification while operating in the field.

This law enforcement badge credential holder boasts a strong and sturdy construction, made from 100% genuine, heavy gauge leather for long-lasting durability. This particular book-style police badge holder wallet is compact, featuring a simple and straightforward bi-fold design with smooth turned edges and round corners. Over time, the police badge holder wallet case will soften and mold to your belongings and police badge, without compromising on the quality construction, shape or finish.

Available in shield, oval or round badge cut-outs.

Badge attachment is clip-back pin, no screws required. Maximum ID Size: 2.75 x 4 inches.

NOTE: Police Badge is NOT included with purchase. Search Terms: law enforcement tactical gear CIA FBI minimalist credit card id holder cop private investigator security detective badge display case travel accessories criminal investigation Features: - POLICE BADGE HOLDER WALLET: Designed for carrying police badges and department issued ID credentials for officers while on duty, there is no credit card compartment. Only a clear ID slot and a recessed badge insert with suede protector flap - RECESSED POLICE BADGE DESIGN: Badge case has a minimal and compact low profile design due to the badge cut-out inlay; the badge attachment is a clip back pin style so no screws are required - QUALITY LEATHER: This leather police badge holder boasts strong and sturdy construction, made from 100% genuine, heavy gauge leather for long last lasting durability - SPECIFICATIONS: Wallet size: 3" x 5" (W x H); Maximum ID Card Size: 2.75" x 4"; Maximum round badge size: 2.25 inches; Color: Black; Note: Badge attachment is clip-back pin (no screws required); NOTE: Police ID Badge is NOT included - Please ensure that you compare your badge dimensions to the product image image specifications of the badge shape to ensure proper fit === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Federal Black Round Police Badge ID Holder Wallet

anthropic.title_differentiation: Genuine Leather, Recessed Badge Design, Compact Bifold, Low Profile, Clip-Back Pin Attachment
